page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: ENMA201 or ENMA289A.

Formerly: ENMA289A.

ENMA300 Introduction to Materials Engineering (3 Credits)

Structure of materials, chemical composition, phase transformations, corrosion and mechanical properties of metals, ceramics, polymers and related materials. Materials selection in engineering applications. Prerequisite: ENES100; and permission of ENGR-Materials Science & Engineering department.
